title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
